zh.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona是Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona的兒子，於大約1087年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩。他於大約1117年與Beatriz de Montcada在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1173年4月20日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona是Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona的儿子，于大约1087年出生在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩。他于大约1117年与Beatriz de Montcada在西班牙卡塔倫亞巴薩隆拿蒙卡達 I 萊薩结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1173年4月20日之后。

nameMeanings.name: Guillem
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: Ramón

en.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona was born about 1087, in Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain as the son of Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona. He married Beatriz de Montcada about 1117, in Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalonia, Spain. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 20 April 1173.

ko.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona(은)는 대략 1087년 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악에서 Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1117년 스페인 카털니아 바셀나 몽카다 이 레이스악에서 Beatriz de Montcada(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1173년 4월 20일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona nasceu aproximadamente 1087, em Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha filho de Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona. Ele casou-se com Beatriz de Montcada aproximadamente 1117, em Montcada i Reixac, Barcelona, Catalunya, Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 20 de abril de 1173.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona родился около 1087 г. в местности монткада и риксак, барселона, каталуня, Испания. Его отца звали Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatriz de Montcada около 1117 г. в местности монткада и риксак, барселона, каталуня, Испания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер после 20 апрель 1173 г.

es.lifeSummary: Guillem Ramón II Senescal de Barcelona nació aproximadamente 1087, en Moncada y Reixach, Barcelona, Cataluña, España como hijo de Guillem Ramón I Senescal de Barcelona. Se casó con Beatriz de Montcada aproximadamente 1117, en Moncada y Reixach, Barcelona, Cataluña, España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 20 de abril de 1173.
